tags.name: Middle Neck Road
tags.not:name: Middleneck Road
tags.note: No trucks allowed. Ownership transferred from Nassau County to the Village of Flower Hill in 2022. Speed limit lowered to 25 MPH in the summer of 2022. Crosswalks at Greenway/MNR intersection added on July 26, 2022, along with street parking stalls.

tags.note: Ridge Drive West is a one way towards Northern Boulevard on both sides of Desmond Gallagher Green.
